tools.name: present_pdf
tools.description: Upload a PDF to start a local Presio presentation. Returns a url — open it in a browser to finish handoff (skips share). Same as POST /api/present.

tools.name: check_pdf
tools.description: Validate Presio notes/media sidecar attachments in a PDF. Same as POST /api/check.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: present_pdf, check_pdf · Public sink: present_pdf, check_pdf.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: present_pdf, check_pdf · Public sink: present_pdf, check_pdf

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
